title: The Trouble with Harry
writer: John Michael Hayes, Jack Trevor Story
actors: John Forsythe, Shirley MacLaine, Edmund Gwenn
plot: Harry's dead and, while no one really minds, everyone feels responsible. After Harry's body is found in the woods, several locals must determine not only how and why he was killed but what to do with the body.
awards: Nominated for 2 BAFTA Awards. 1 win & 4 nominations total
